purpose: Builds and injects fenced AI_CONTEXT (session state) and AI_UNDERSTANDING (codebase model) blocks into agent files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, .cursorrules, .windsurfrules) per the user's configured agents. Also handles Codex bootstrap files at projectsRoot/$HOME and .gitignore updates.
invariants: AI_CTX (<!-- AI_CTX_START -->) and AI_UNDERSTANDING (<!-- AI_UNDERSTANDING_START -->) marker pairs are independent — the two injectors never overlap.
injectMarkedBlock is idempotent: skips fs.writeFileSync when the resulting content equals existing — prevents the AIU watcher feedback loop.
kilo and codex agents both target AGENTS.md; getInjectionTargets dedupes so a single file is written once.
findGitRepoRoots scans ≤ CODEX_REPO_SCAN_MAX_DEPTH levels deep, skipping node_modules / dist / build / etc.
updateGitignore groups paths by their nearest .gitignore so nested git repos do not mix entries.

buildInjectionBlock and buildMultiInjectionBlock must both contain the literal phrase 'Do NOT include' in their CTX_UPDATE instruction — this is the only signal interactive (non-CLI) agents have that the JSON must go to the sidecar, not the chat reply, and a unit test pins both wordings.

injectIntoFile calls scrubLeakedContextUpdates before injectMarkedBlock so stray CTX_UPDATE lines outside our marker block are removed; the scrub deliberately preserves content inside the marker block because the instruction text there embeds the literal CTX_UPDATE:{...} template.
gotchas: getCodexBootstrapTargets writes to BOTH projectsRoot/AGENTS.md AND $HOME/AGENTS.md — Codex sessions started from anywhere under home can find the bootstrap.
Calling injectMarkedBlock on a file with a missing end marker creates a fresh block at EOF; orphaned start markers are not auto-repaired.
AGENT_TARGETS map is keyed by agent id (claude, codex, copilot, cursor, windsurf, kilo) — adding a new agent requires both this map and the package.json enum.

scrubLeakedContextUpdates only protects content within the AI_CTX marker pair; if an agent ever wrote CTX_UPDATE inside the AI_UNDERSTANDING block (different markers) it would still be stripped — which is fine because the AIU block has no legitimate CTX_UPDATE content.
